body.title: igor_shim connect() tests time out on announce (pre-existing, pre-reorg)
body.description:
**Problem:** 4 tests in tests/test_igor_shim.py (test_connect_announces_and_caches_client, test_capability_accessors_forward_after_connect, test_self_test_passed_when_connected, test_rollback_drops_connection) fail with AnnounceTimeoutError ('No manifest received on announce-events within 2.0s'). Confirmed PRE-EXISTING — reproduces at the pre-reorg commit a5f4dab0~1 (not caused by the single-package collapse; base.yaml present at both old + new config/profiles paths). Owned by CC regardless (sole maintainer). test_announce_round_trip (same announce infra) PASSES, so the announce mechanism works — the failure is specific to IgorShim.connect()'s full broker-resolution + 2s timeout path.
**Proposed shape:** Diagnose why IgorShim.connect() gets no manifest within 2s while the direct-broker round-trip succeeds. Candidates: (a) the in-process IMAPServer announce-events listener thread not started/wired in the igor_shim fixture; (b) shared_secret/proof mismatch in resolve_announce vs the test's proof={'shared_secret':'test-rack-secret'}; (c) the broker's _CANONICAL_PROFILES_DIR/base.yaml load vs the fixture's tmp profiles_dir; (d) a genuinely too-tight 2s timeout under CI/load. Fix the wiring or the test as the diagnosis dictates; do NOT just bump the timeout to paper over a real handshake bug.
**Affected files:** TBD — discovery: tests/test_igor_shim.py fixture, unseen_university/announce/igor_shim.py connect(), unseen_university/announce/broker.py resolve_announce, listener wiring.
**Design rules:** CP1 (diagnose root cause, not symptom); log the interface crossing (announce request/manifest) so the timeout is observable.
**Scope boundary:** IN — the 4 igor_shim connect/announce-timeout failures. OUT — broader announce redesign; the config-dir resolver (separate ticket).
**Test plan:** All 4 named tests in tests/test_igor_shim.py pass deterministically (isolated AND in the full suite); the fix names the root cause (wiring/auth/profile/timeout) in the close note, not a blind timeout bump.

body.result: DIAGNOSED (note: cc.0.igor-shim-announce-diagnosis): ~12 announce timeouts (igor_shim 4 + datacenter_client 8) are a CONCURRENCY issue — tests drive listener.pump() in a background daemon thread + main-thread client.announce() poll against the DEPRECATED embedded-asyncio IMAPServer; the multi-thread round-trip stalls. NOT the announce logic (test_announce_listener drives same broker+pump synchronously, passes), NOT proof/profile/config/reorg. Fix = migrate these tests to PgBus/make_bus_connection(): filed T-migrate-announce-tests-off-deprecated-imapserver.
body.unproven_reason: diagnosis ticket — deliverable is the root-cause finding + fix ticket, no code change; lever still lacking = a content-artifact proof mode for an investigation finding. Root cause evidenced by the sync-pass/threaded-timeout contrast.
